Specification: ZF 8HP50Z (budget) or 8HP70Z N57 (preferred)
Notes: PREFERRED: 8HP70Z N57 — 700Nm input rating vs 500Nm on 8HP50. Required for 07K turbo headroom. Source from F10 530d/535d, F01 730d, F30 335d diesel. eBay ~$800-2500. BUDGET: 8HP50Z — from F30 340i, F32 440i, G01 X3 30i (B46/B48/B58 petrol donors). eBay ~$500-1500. IMPORTANT: 8HP50/51 from B48/B58 petrol donors DOES use N57-style bellhousing (DomiWorks 1.8T adapter supports it). Torque argument still stands — 8HP50 (500 Nm) is marginal for a turbo 07K; 8HP70 (700 Nm) preferred. PMC Motorsport M5x adapter fits both variants. Check MaxxECU hardware ID compatibility before buying either unit. Facebook Marketplace typically 10-20% below eBay. Price Low = 8HP50Z floor. Price High = 8HP70Z N57 ceiling.

Specification: MaxxECU Race GEN1 8HP CAN Control (native — no separate TCU)
Notes: MaxxECU Race controls 8HP natively via CAN — no TurboLamik needed. Requires: (1) MaxxECU 8HP GEN1 CAN harness #2287 (BMW shifter variant) ~$366-382 from LPS (https://lpsfab.com/products/maxxecu-8hp-gen1-cable-harness-bmw-8hp-shifter) or maxxecu.us; (2) Yanhua ACDP-2 TCU flash tool — rent ~$138.23 or buy $737.80. VERIFY transmission hardware ID compatibility before purchase: maxxecu.com/webhelp/advanced-8hp-hardware_identifier.html. Supports shift pts 1500-9000 RPM, virtual clutch control, transbrake. Saves ~$2000+ vs TurboLamik bundle. HARNESS DETAIL: pre-terminated 12-pin GT150 to 8HP TCU (CAN H/L + main 12V + wakeup + GND) + BMW F-series 10-pin CAN shifter connector. Running DCTShifter in SEQ mode: BMW 10-pin end capped unused. CRITICAL: TCU main 12V must be live 10-15s before key-on wakeup signal or TCU partially fails to init — use power-hold relay, not both wires on same switched fuse.

Specification: TurboLamik 8HP Bundle
Notes: Use if 8HP50 hardware ID is not on MaxxECU compatibility list. Dedicated TCU; broader transmission variant support; more established for E-series BMW swaps. Requires CAN handshake config between TurboLamik and MaxxECU.

Specification: DCTShifter sequential shifter — 270GT / 290GTE / 390GT (model is ergonomic choice)
Notes: Verified $454 base (dctshifter.com). REQUIRED — stock E36 manual gear lever does nothing with 8HP. Install at same time as transmission. Swedish-made motorsport build, explicitly MaxxECU-compatible. Models: 270GT Aluminum (compact/short-throw), 290GTE Carbon Fiber (taller throw), 390GT Aluminum (full-size). All wire identically. WIRING (4 wires): +12V switched + GND + UP signal (momentary GND closure) + DOWN signal (momentary GND closure). Wire UP → MaxxECU DIN = Transmission UP shift. Wire DOWN → MaxxECU DIN = Transmission DOWN shift. No CAN. MTune: Advanced > 8HP gearbox control > Shifter type > 8HP SEQ shifter. Hold UP = launch control / 8HP transbrake. Active inventory — unlike LPS #2355 which has no US ETA.

Specification: PMC Motorsport M5x to 8HP Adapter
Notes: Phase 1 (M52) ONLY. At Phase 3 (07K swap): this plate is removed and replaced with a 07K→8HP adapter — see Phase 2 CSV. Options: DomiWorks VW 1.8T/1.9T kit ($1334 + billet flywheel) or Chatham CNC custom kit (quote req. — adapter plate + adapter flex plate + modified TC; contact @chathamcnc / mike@chathamcnc.com).

Specification: Condor Speed Shop Slim RHD Shaft
Notes: Verified $308.99. RHD fitment explicitly confirmed by manufacturer: 'All E36's including right-hand drive models.' Mandatory for RHD clearance with 8HP and top-mount turbo. EPS compatible — EPS motor acts on column above firewall; this shaft operates below firewall to rack, no interference. Keep both U-joint angles below ~15 degrees at install to prevent torque oscillation through EPS controller.

Seems Legit Garage Custom 1-Piece Aluminum Shaft

Specification: Seems Legit Garage E36/Z3 DCT & 8HP Swap Crossmember
Notes: Required — stock E36 crossmember will not locate 8HP correctly. Laser-cut steel; slotted for use with or without adapter plate; fits OEM angled BMW 8HP rear mounts. Source: turboe46.blogspot.com/p/zf-8hp-swap.html

Specification: BMW 96mm Output Flange (E90/E91/E92 non-35i auto)
Notes: Required — N57 8HP70 ships with 105mm PCD flange; E36 guibo is 96mm. Swap flange before install. PN 26117511454 (cross-ref 24207552327). Non-35i F/E-series only — 35i uses 110mm. NOT stocked at FCP Euro or ECS Tuning — source used from eBay/parts car. Source: turboe46.blogspot.com/p/zf-8hp-swap.html

Specification: N54 8-Bolt Automatic Flexplate + Bolts
Notes: Required — M5x is manual-only from factory; 8HP needs an automatic flexplate. PN 11227553157 + bolts PN 11227522125. ~$810 new at ECS Tuning (ES#20413); ~$80-150 used from parts car. Source: turboe46.blogspot.com/p/zf-8hp-swap.html Phase 3 note: at 07K swap this N54 flexplate is removed — the 07K adapter kit (DomiWorks or Chatham CNC) includes its own flexplate/flex plate. Budget $0 at Phase 3 for this item.

Specification: George W. Hill M5x Starter Adapter (for N54 starter)
Notes: Required — M5x mounts starter to block; 8HP-equipped BMWs mount to trans. Adapter allows N54 starter (PN 12412354701) to be used. Ref: https://youtu.be/bWVo-TpdQCQ. Source: turboe46.blogspot.com/p/zf-8hp-swap.html

Specification: MaxxECU RACE M50 Bundle (with harness)
Notes: Verified

Specification: Radium Engineering 20-1170 — BMW E36 (drop-in, 10AN ORB out, dual-pump capable)
Notes: VERIFIED $549.95, in stock. Drop-in replacement for both OEM fuel hat assemblies on E36 saddle tank. 10AN ORB female pump-out + return ports on top plate. PRV venturi jet pump saddle crossover. Dual-pump capable. Brushless capable. E85/methanol compliant. Reuses OEM level sensors. No tank cutting. INSTALL AT PHASE 1 — carries through 07K with zero re-work. Install PDF: https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0887/4193/7449/files/19-0359.pdf. Wiring ref: https://github.com/wesleyxcooper/e36-wiring/blob/main/fuel-pump-hanger-reference.md. WireViz: https://github.com/wesleyxcooper/e36-wiring/blob/main/harnesses/fuel-pump-hanger.wv. Harness diagram: https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/wesleyxcooper/e36-wiring/blob/main/output/fuel-pump-hanger.html.

Specification: Walbro F90000267 — 465 LPH E85 (pump only — no install kit)
Notes: VERIFIED $181.12. Fits Radium 20-1170 directly (39mm/50mm DCSS body — hanger designed for this format). E85-rated. 465 LPH @ 40 PSI @ 13.5V, 14.1A draw. Single pump covers all phases through 07K 600whp E85. MaxxECU PWM speed control via 40A DC SSR (Crydom D1D40 or equiv): IGN +12V -> SSR Ctrl(+) | MaxxECU GPO (GND-sink) -> SSR Ctrl(-) | Fused BATT+ (25A) -> SSR Load -> pump(+) stud. Do NOT use mechanical relay for PWM — SSR required. 12 AWG power/ground. 22 AWG shielded GPO signal. Dedicated chassis GND stud (not ECU sensor ground). MTune: Outputs -> Output config -> PWM fuel pump control, 100-500 Hz. Duty: 65% idle / 100% WOT. Phase 3: full duty under boost. Schematic: https://github.com/wesleyxcooper/e36-wiring/blob/main/schematics/fuel-pump-pwm.svg.

Specification: Radium 20-1000-1010 — 10AN ORB Swivel Banjo to 10AN Male (feed port x1)
Notes: VERIFIED $34.95/ea. Threads into 10AN ORB pump-out port on Radium 20-1170 top plate. 360-degree swivel after install — required for tight E36 tank tunnel clearance. Feed: 20-1000-1010 (10AN ORB to 10AN male) -> -10AN braided line -> Aeromotive 13129 FPR inlet. Return: use included 8.5mm OEM barb adapter (OEM return line). Optional return upgrade: add 20-1000-0606 (6AN ORB swivel, same price) if converting return to full AN. Minimum order: 1x 20-1000-1010 for feed. Install tip: thread hand-tight, attach braided line, THEN final torque to allow swivel to set correct angle.

Specification: Aeromotive 13129 Compact Adjustable EFI FPR

Specification: Bosch LSU 4.2 Wideband Lambda Sensor
Notes: Verified $69. MaxxECU M50 harness includes LSU 4.2 6-pin connector — this is the matching sensor. Required for closed-loop fueling and tune. Weld a 18mm x 1.5 bung into the downpipe/exhaust. Re-use same sensor at 07K swap — just move bung to new exhaust.

Specification: CSF Aluminum Radiator (3054)
Notes: Verified. Carries to 07K turbo phase — adequate coolant capacity for 600whp with electric fan assist.

Notes: Kit ($200.99): 16 SPAL pull fan + relay harness + thermostat switch. STAGE 1 (OEM ECU): wire thermostat switch standalone — triggers relay at ~87C

Specification: Mishimoto E36 Aluminum Coolant Expansion Tank
Notes: Verified $190.95 sale / $210 regular. Direct-fit TIG-welded aluminum replacement for failure-prone OEM plastic tank. Available anodized black or polished. Required before any track use. Carries to 07K phase.

Specification: Mishimoto MMOCF-BMW Line Fitting Kit + 10-row cooler core + AN lines
Notes: MMOCF-BMW adapter kit (~$89 approx.) adds -10AN ports to M52/M50 OEM oil housing. Pair with Setrab or Mocal 10-row cooler core (~$120-150) + -10AN braided lines (~$60-80). Full install in Phase 1 carries to 07K — re-plumb lines at engine swap. Thermostatic sandwich plate alternative: Mishimoto MMOP-SPT $170.95 (universal — preferred if not using OEM oil housing).

Specification: Autopower U-Weld Roll Bar Kit (E36 Convertible 1993-1999)
Notes: REQUIRED for HPDE/drift use in an open-top car. Most NASA/SCCA track events mandate roll protection for convertibles above beginner group. Autopower U-Weld: full hoop + rear braces + diagonal cross + harness bar. Requires welding (local fab shop ~$150-200 labor). Required BEFORE first track day.

Specification: Kidde Halotron 2.5lb + Bracket
Notes: Required at virtually all HPDE and drift events. Mount within driver reach. 2.5lb Halotron clean-agent preferred over dry chemical (no corrosion damage to interior/electronics).

Notes: Verified

Specification: Used E36 M3 front spindles/uprights (pair) — 1996–1999 US M3 or Z3M ONLY
Notes: PART NUMBERS: Left 31212227907 / Right 31212227908. Shared between 1996–1999 E36 M3 and 1996–2002 Z3M Roadster/Coupe. Discontinued from BMW new — used/salvage only. Individual sides run $199–$275 on eBay; pairs $450–550. Z3M salvage yards are the best source (same part more plentiful than M3 donors). DO NOT USE Euro M3 3.2 Evo spindles — Evo spindles are designed to work with a shorter Evo-specific control arm; installing on standard-length OEM arms (required by SLR Mini Kit) produces incorrect KPI and roll-center geometry. 1995 US M3 spindles (31212227357 / 358) have a slight camber variance vs 96–99 spec — replace as a matched pair only, never mix generations. Benefit over non-M: reduces KPI (~1–2°), raises roll center ~20mm, improves camber gain curve. Compatible with non-M OEM control arms — same ball joint taper. Source alongside M3 hubs if doing 5-lug conversion. Ref: MRT Engineering Geometry Guide page 4.

Specification: Revshift Offset Front Control Arm Bushing (E36 — offset variant)
Notes: INCLUDED in Revshift full poly bushing kit — specify OFFSET variant (not centered) at order time. Adds ~1° caster on non-M arms. Non-M E36 used centered FCABs from factory; offset is a direct drop-in — same inner diameter. Fix for spin: roughen bushing OD with sandpaper before pressing in. Ref: FCP Euro FCAB install guide (fcpeuro.com/blog/how-to-install-revshift-offset-fcabs-bmw-e30-e36-z3). Price range is standalone cost if ordered separately — included in bushing kit.

Specification: Ground Control Caster/Camber Plates (E36) or Vorshlag equivalent
Notes: Adjustable strut tops — primary function is CASTER adjustment, not camber. Combined with offset FCAB targets 6-7 degrees total caster. CRITICAL: Set static camber via lower strut mount spacers (~0.3 deg per mm) NOT via strut top position — tilting the strut via the top mount changes KPI. Communicate this explicitly to any alignment shop. Ground Control E36 plates confirmed fitment; Vorshlag also makes E36-specific plates.

Specification: SLR Speed E36 M3 BMW Mini Kit — Roll Center + Steering Quickening + Adjustable Ackermann
Notes: Verified $805.04. Uses OEM control arms — replaces outer ball joint with Teflon-lined spherical bearing + SLR steering plate. Specs: 35mm roll center correction; bump steer correction; ~40% steering quickening (28-30% fewer turns lock-to-lock); adjustable Ackermann (Race or Drift setting — flip as needed). Steering lock ~40-50 degrees. Set Ackermann to Race/positive for street; Drift/zero for sessions. MUST specify M3 knuckle type + control arm type at order — SLR holds order until confirmed. Compatible with M3 knuckles. Do NOT use Wisefab with M3 knuckles — incompatible. Ref: SLRspeed Complete E36 Angle Kit Guide (slrspeed.com/blogs/news/e36-angle-kit-steering-geometry-drift-guide).

Specification: Used E46 330i Front Calipers/Carriers
NES Engineering 6:1 Pedal Ratio Kit
Notes: $216 base kit. Removes vacuum booster; changes pedal ratio 3:1 → 6:1 using stock master cylinder. Install at Phase 1 — firewall work is easier with engine bay open early. Critical for Phase 3: 07K turbo has no usable manifold vacuum under boost, eliminating need for a vacuum pump. Requires: grind 2mm off firewall hole + pedal box, drill new hole in brake pedal (irreversible but minor). Tradeoff: higher pedal effort and more travel than OEM boosted. Optional upgrade: Wilwood or Tilton 19mm master cylinder (~$150-200) if effort is too high after adjust. Price High includes optional MC upgrade. Track-only rated.
